hooks.command:
cmd=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command'); if echo "$cmd" | grep -q 'vercel --prod'; then osascript -e 'tell application "Google Chrome"
  repeat with w in windows
    set tabList to tabs of w
    repeat with t in tabList
      if URL of t contains "workshop.mastermindshq.business" then
        reload t
        activate
        return
      end if
    end repeat
  end repeat
end tell'; fi
